description.content: Methods for discovering available datasets, parameters, and valid values.
Returns a list of all available BEA datasets with descriptions.

query.description: (Required) Your registered BEA API key (36-character UUID).

description.content: Returns a list of the parameters (required and optional) for a particular dataset.

query.description: (Required) Name of the dataset for which to retrieve parameters.

response.name: List of parameters for the specified dataset.

description.content: Returns a list of valid values for a specified parameter within a dataset.

query.description: (Required) Name of the parameter for which to retrieve valid values.

response.name: Valid values for the specified parameter.

description.content: National Income and Product Accounts, Fixed Assets, and related national economic statistics.
Retrieves data from the National Income and Product Accounts (NIPA) dataset. NIPA tables cover GDP, personal income, consumer spending, corporate profits, and other national economic aggregates.

query.description: (Required) NIPA table name (e.g., T10101 for GDP).
(Required) Year(s) for data retrieval. Use 'X' for all years.

description.content: Retrieves data from the Fixed Assets dataset covering net stock of fixed assets, depreciation, investment, and related measures for private and government fixed assets in the United States.

query.description: (Required) Fixed assets table name (e.g., FAAt101 for Current-Cost Net Stock).

description.content: State, metropolitan area, and county level economic data.

Retrieves state and local area economic data from the Regional dataset. Includes GDP by state, personal income, and employment data at the state, metropolitan statistical area (MSA), and county level.

query.description: (Required) Regional table code (e.g., SQGDP1 for Quarterly GDP by State).
(Required) Line code within the regional table.
(Required) Geographic FIPS code. Use 'STATE' for all states, '00000' for US total.
(Required) Year(s) for data retrieval. Use 'LAST5' for last 5 years.

description.content: GDP by industry, input-output accounts, and sector-level data.
Retrieves GDP-by-industry data, including value added, gross output, and intermediate inputs by industry sector (NAICS-based).

query.description: (Required) Industry code. Use 'ALL' for all industries.

description.content: Retrieves data from the Input-Output dataset covering supply and use tables, requirements tables, and make and use tables for the U.S. economy.
International transactions, investment position, and multinational enterprise data.
Retrieves data from the International Transactions Accounts (ITA) dataset. Covers U.S. current account, capital account, and financial account transactions with the rest of the world.

query.description: (Required) ITA indicator code (e.g., BalGds for Balance on Goods).
(Required) Country or area code. Use 'AllCountries' for all.

description.content: Retrieves data on U.S. multinational enterprises (MNEs) and foreign multinational enterprises operating in the United States, including financial and operating data.

query.description: (Required) Direction of investment - outward (US parent) or inward (foreign parent).
(Required) MNE series identifier for the measure requested.

description.content:
The Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) Data API provides programmatic access to BEA published economic statistics using industry-standard methods and procedures. The API includes methods for retrieving a subset of statistical data and the metadata that describes it. Available datasets include National Income and Product Accounts (NIPA), Multinational Enterprises (MNE), Fixed Assets, International Transactions Accounts (ITA), International Investment Position (IIP), Input-Output tables, Regional data, GDP by Industry, and more.

Contact Support:
 Name: Bureau of Economic Analysis Developer Support
